links.source_location: Project structure shows app/ as root Next.js pages
Community 0 Starter Docs and Branding: Next.js Starter Project
Architecture Overview - wagmi v2 + viem v2
Features: Low Gas Fees - Built on Avalanche for 100x cheaper transactions
Avalanche Providers community connects to Avalanche Mainnet
Acknowledgments: Uniswap V2 for the AMM design
Features: Uniswap V2 AMM - Constant product market maker
DEXPriceNode fetches price data from liquidity pools
use-dex-swap calls swap execution against contracts
SwapNode action would invoke swap router contract
Both SwapNode and SwapCardDex execute token swaps but in different contexts (automated vs manual)
God Nodes: saveToLocalStorage() 3 edges, handleAddAddress 3 edges
God Nodes community: handleAddAddress 3 edges, validateAddress 2 edges
Portfolio Analytics page renders portfolio components
Portfolio Analytics page renders portfolio components
WalletAnalysisPanel and WalletAnalysisDemo both provide wallet analysis UI; demo is likely a preview/sandbox version
Portfolio Analytics page contains wallet analysis
WalletAnalysisPanel would call analyzeWallet from lib/api
Community 0 - Top Bar Actions cohesion analysis
God Nodes: getScheduleNode 2 edges to handleRun
Top Bar Actions community drives ScheduleTriggerNode
Agent Builder UI page renders FlowCanvas
FlowCanvas orchestrates bot execution through lib
AgentSidebar likely interacts with AgentChatbotService for chat
Community 0 Chatbot Validation - AgentStorageManager bridge node
Both ScheduleTriggerNodes are the same logical concept - schedule-based workflow triggering
avax-agent standalone app mirrors lib/agent-builder execution engine
avax-agent runBot and lib/agent-builder runBot serve the same purpose - executing the agent workflow
ChatbotPanel UI component connects to chatbot service backend
Backtest History community: fetchBinanceHistory used in backtest
Community 2 Bot Execution and Backtest nodes
Both POST handlers serve agent builder API routes - main app and avax-agent may share pattern
Root App Shell and Main App Layout communities
Main App Layout contains Trade Page route
Main App Layout contains Portfolio Analytics route
Main App Layout contains Explore Tokens route
Sidebar is part of the main app layout
Builder Layout community contains Agent Builder UI
